meta.title: Growth Infrastructure for Enterprise — Custom Software, AI Agents & Paid Acquisition
meta.description: We build custom digital growth infrastructure for established businesses — paid acquisition, AI-powered automation, proprietary software, and enterprise CRM architecture, engineered into one growth engine. Book a strategic diagnostic session.

hero.subheadline: We build custom digital growth infrastructure — integrating paid acquisition, AI-powered automation, proprietary software, and enterprise CRM architecture into one growth engine. If you're past basic marketing and ready to build a real competitive moat, we should talk.
hero.trust: We take a limited number of enterprise clients each quarter.

positioning.title: We're not an ad agency. We're a growth engineering firm.
paragraphs: Most agencies run your ads. We architect your entire customer-acquisition infrastructure — from top-of-funnel targeting to custom AI follow-up agents to enterprise-grade CRM pipelines and proprietary software built for your business model.

The result isn't a campaign you rent month to month. It's an owned, compounding asset: a measurable growth engine where every layer — acquisition, conversion, automation, attribution — is engineered to work as one system.

stats.label: integrated growth engine, not five disconnected tools
quarterly strategic review, not monthly box-checking

capabilities.title: The full capability stack
capabilities.intro: Four integrated layers, engineered to function as a single growth system — not a list of services you stitch together yourself.

groups.title: Paid Acquisition
items: Meta Ads — advanced audience architecture, creative testing, full-funnel sequencing
Google Ads — Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max
Attribution modelling — first/last-touch, data-driven, and custom

groups.title: Conversion Infrastructure
items: Custom landing systems with dynamic personalization
Full marketing automation — email, SMS, push, retargeting

groups.title: Software & Technology
items: Custom CRM development — owned by you
AI agent deployment — follow-up, qualification, booking
Custom software projects — internal tools, portals, dashboards
API integrations and proprietary automation workflows

groups.title: Strategy & Intelligence
items: Quarterly growth audits and competitive analysis
Dedicated strategist and technical account management

differentiators.title: Two layers most agencies can't build

blocks.title: AI agents that work while you sleep
blocks.body: We deploy custom AI agents that handle lead response (under 60 seconds, 24/7), qualification, appointment booking, follow-up, and pipeline updates — without human intervention. Not automation. Intelligent infrastructure.
points: Custom-trained on your business, offers, and brand voice
Escalates to a human at exactly the right moment
Full conversation logging and analysis for continuous improvement

blocks.title: Technology built for your business, not rented from someone else's
blocks.body: We scope, design, and build custom software — internal ops tools, client-facing platforms, proprietary advantages. If a SaaS tool almost does what you need, we build the version that does it exactly.
points: Discovery and scoping workshops to define the real requirement
Full IP transfer — you own everything we build
Ongoing maintenance and iteration as you scale

testimonials.quote: They didn't just optimize our spend — they rebuilt the entire acquisition stack and handed us a CRM and AI follow-up system we now own outright. Pipeline velocity is a different business now.
testimonials.name: VP of Growth

testimonials.quote: The custom AI agents respond to every lead in under a minute, around the clock. Our human team only touches qualified, booked conversations. It paid for itself inside the first quarter.
testimonials.name: Founder & CEO

engagement.title: How we work with enterprise clients

phases.title: Month 1 — Diagnostic
phases.desc: A full audit of your acquisition, tech stack, and growth blockers. We map where revenue is leaking and where the real ceiling is.

phases.title: Month 2–3 — Architecture
phases.desc: We design and build the core infrastructure — acquisition, conversion systems, AI agents, CRM, and any custom software the model requires.

phases.title: Month 4+ — Scale
phases.desc: Continuous optimization, expansion into new channels, and iteration on the system as the data compounds.

engagement.note: Retainer, project-based, or hybrid. Minimum engagement: 3 months.

leadSection.title: Book a strategic diagnostic session
leadSection.subtitle: A 60-minute deep-dive into your acquisition infrastructure. You'll leave with a clear picture of your growth ceiling and what it takes to break through it. Limited to 4 sessions per month.
bullets: A defensible read on your true growth ceiling — not a sales pitch
A concrete view of where your acquisition and tech stack leak revenue
A peer-to-peer conversation, strategist to decision maker

placeholders.primaryChallenge: Where is growth bottlenecked — acquisition, conversion, tech, or attribution?

leadForm.consent: By submitting, you agree we may contact you about your enquiry. We treat everything you share as confidential and never share your details.
leadForm.success: Request received — we'll be in touch.
leadForm.successSub: A strategist will reach out at your preferred time to confirm your diagnostic session.
leadForm.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly.

finalCta.title: Limited to 4 strategic sessions per month.
finalCta.subtitle: We take a limited number of enterprise clients each quarter so every engagement gets senior strategic and technical attention. If you're serious about building a growth system, secure a session now.
finalCta.microcopy: Sessions fill quarterly. We reply to qualified enquiries within one business day.

footer.tagline: We build custom digital growth infrastructure for businesses ready to build a real competitive moat.
footer.fullSite: Explore the full New Age site
